title: Drushyam
desc: A man lives a peaceful life with his wife and two daughters. When his wife and eldest daughter get entangled in a grave crime, he must protect them from harm.

title: Angarakshakudu
desc: An honest policeman devises a plan to combat anti-social elements and vows to rid society of crime. He wages a determined war against lawlessness and corruption.

title: Ranadheera
desc: A tribal forest officer trains five women NCC cadets to plunge deep into the forest in order to save a satellite from conspiring foreigners.

title: Rajadhi Raja
desc: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Rajadhi Raja
desc: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Oke Maata
desc: JP, an evil industrialist, dumps all the toxic waste generated from his industry into the sea. Soon, the leader of the fishing community with a startling past rises against the corrupt industrialist.

title: Mayagadu
desc: Leela Krishna, a money-minded lawyer, tricks a rich girl into falling in love with him and gets married to her in the hopes of staying at her home. However, his dreams are soon shattered.

title: Disco
desc: Disco, an orphan who values friendship the most, falls for Shiny, the daughter of a Bangkok don. However, the don kidnaps his friends and asks him to choose between his lover and his friends.

title: Manasunnodu
desc: Forced to marry his sister to a local thug, a young man faces humiliation when the ruffian subsequently exploits their bond to bully him.

title: Seenu
desc: Shwetha falls in love with Seenu, whom she supposes to be speech impaired. Seenu feels guilty and asks a doctor to cut off his tongue to win her love.

title: Sambaram
desc: Ravi is a laidback man, but Geeta, the woman he loves, is an engineer who prefers a responsible life partner. Ravi decides to change and heads to Dubai to prove himself.

title: Desamuduru
desc: After Bala, who works for a TV channel, gets into trouble with a thug, he is sent away for an out-of-town assignment. He meets and falls in love with a woman who is shortly kidnapped by a gangster.
After witnessing repeated nightmares of a woman being killed, an investigative journalist goes on to find out its truth.
